form_name: Coastal Gateway Health Center — Patient Intake
ai_instructions: You are conducting a patient intake at Coastal Gateway Health Center (CGHC). Work through all 4 sections in order: Registration, Health History, HIPAA Consent, General Consents. Ask one question at a time. Follow all skip_if rules to avoid asking irrelevant questions. Follow all flag_if rules to note clinical alerts. Deliver sensitive fields with the framing specified. Always offer 'Decline to specify' for sensitive demographic fields. Never show patients legal boilerplate — summarize in plain language. When a patient discloses attempted suicide, acknowledge with empathy before recording and moving on.

sections.name: Section 1: Registration
sections.intro: Opens with language detection, then identity, contact, demographics, and insurance. Every skip and branch is driven by prior answers.

fields.label: Preferred Language
fields.ai_note: Ask this FIRST before any other question. If 'Other', collect free text and proceed in English. All subsequent AI responses should be in the selected language. Form output is always English.
fields.branch: Sets translation layer for entire session.

fields.label: Filling Out For
fields.ai_note: Ask before name or DOB. If 'Someone else', switch to guardian mode — reframe all subsequent questions to third person ('What is the patient's name?' vs 'What is your name?'). Responsible party section becomes required.
fields.branch: 'Myself' = standard flow. 'Someone else' = guardian mode, all pronouns adjusted.

fields.label: Patient Full Name (Last, First)
fields.validate: Must contain at least two word segments (first and last name). Flag if only one name provided.
fields.ai_note: If patient provides only one name, prompt: 'Could you give me both your first and last name?'

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.validate: Must be a real date. Flag if DOB indicates patient is under 18 and guardian mode is not already active.
fields.branch: If age < 18 and not in guardian mode, prompt: 'It looks like this patient is a minor. Who is filling this out today?' Then activate guardian mode.
fields.flag_if: Age < 18 and no guardian — flag for staff.

fields.label: Mailing State
fields.validate: Must be a valid 2-letter US state abbreviation.

fields.label: Physical Address Same as Mailing?
fields.ai_note: If Yes, auto-populate physical address as 'Same as mailing' — do not ask physical address fields.

fields.label: Physical Address — Street
fields.ai_note: Only ask if physical_same_as_mailing = No.

fields.label: Physical City
fields.ai_note: Only ask if physical_same_as_mailing = No.

fields.label: Physical State
fields.ai_note: Only ask if physical_same_as_mailing = No.

fields.label: Physical Zip Code
fields.ai_note: Only ask if physical_same_as_mailing = No.

fields.label: Cell Phone Number
fields.validate: Must be 10 digits. Strip formatting characters before validation.
fields.ai_note: Ask for cell first.

fields.label: Home Phone Number
fields.ai_note: Ask after cell. Optional.

fields.label: Work Phone Number
fields.ai_note: Only ask if fewer than 2 phone numbers have been collected (cell + home).

fields.label: Email Address
fields.validate: Must contain @ and a domain if provided.
fields.ai_note: Optional. Mention briefly: 'This will be used for appointment reminders and portal access (Healow).'

fields.label: Demographics Framing
fields.ai_note: Deliver before all demographic questions: 'Now a few questions about identity and background — these help the clinic provide better care. You can skip any of them.' Do not skip this framing.

fields.label: Sex Assigned at Birth
fields.ai_note: Keep separate from gender identity. Do not conflate the two. Decline to specify is a real, respected answer.

fields.label: Gender Identity
fields.ai_note: Never assume gender identity from sex answer. Always ask. 'Other' allows free text.

flag_if.flag: Veteran status — note in clinical summary for potential VA coordination and veteran-specific grant eligibility.
Disability noted — flag for accessibility accommodations and eligibility screening.

fields.label: Emergency Contact Name
fields.ai_note: Always ask — no skip condition.

fields.label: Has Health Insurance
fields.ai_note: If No, skip all insurance fields. Note sliding fee / self-pay pathway in output.

fields.label: Primary Insurance Provider Name
fields.ai_note: Only asked if has_insurance = Yes.

fields.label: Is Policy Holder the Patient?
fields.ai_note: If Yes, skip policyholder detail. If No, collect policyholder name, DOB, and relationship.

fields.label: Policy Holder Name
fields.ai_note: Only if policyholder_is_self = No.

fields.label: Policy Holder Date of Birth
fields.ai_note: Only if policyholder_is_self = No.

fields.label: Policy Holder Relationship to Patient
fields.ai_note: Only if policyholder_is_self = No.

sections.name: Section 2: Health History
sections.intro: Medical history uses grouped multi-select. Family history collapses the matrix. Social/behavioral history needs sensitive framing. Every section has a 'None' fast-path that skips the detail.

fields.label: Diagnosed or Treated Conditions

flag_if.flag: Mandatory reporting context — note in clinical output per CGHC protocol.

fields.ai_note: Present in grouped chunks by category: Cardiovascular, Respiratory, Neurological, Metabolic, Infectious, Other. If patient selects 'None', skip other_health_concerns and move on.

fields.label: Other Health Conditions or Concerns
fields.ai_note: Only shown if patient engaged with the conditions list (did not select None). Free text for anything not captured by checkboxes.

fields.label: Any Family History of Significant Conditions
fields.ai_note: Ask yes/no first. If No, mark family history as None and move on.

fields.label: Family History — Conditions Present
fields.ai_note: Only if family_history_any = Yes. Ask conditions first, then for each confirmed condition ask which family members (Mother, Father, Siblings, Other). Do NOT ask row by row ('does your mother have cancer...'). Collapse the matrix.

fields.label: Family History — Affected Family Members
fields.ai_note: Free text summary: for each condition confirmed in family_history_conditions, note which family members are affected. E.g., 'Cancer: Mother, Siblings; Diabetes: Father'.

fields.label: Mental Health & Lifestyle Framing
fields.ai_note: Deliver this before mental health questions: 'The next questions are about mental health and lifestyle. These help your care team support you fully — everything is confidential. You can skip any question.' This framing is mandatory — do not omit or abbreviate it.

fields.label: Mental Health and Social History (Select all that apply)

flag_if.flag: URGENT — Attempted Suicide disclosed. Flag for immediate staff notification before visit. AI must acknowledge with empathy before recording and moving on.
Trauma-informed care protocol required. Flag for staff.

fields.ai_note: If patient selects 'Attempted Suicide', acknowledge first: 'Thank you for sharing that — our team will make sure you are well supported today.' Then record and continue. Do not skip past it clinically.

fields.label: Current Tobacco / Nicotine Use
fields.branch: If Yes, collect tobacco_type and tobacco_frequency. If No, skip both.

fields.label: Tobacco Type
fields.ai_note: Only if tobacco_use = Yes. Options include: cigarettes, vaping, chewing tobacco, cigars, other.

fields.label: Tobacco Use Frequency
fields.ai_note: Only if tobacco_use = Yes. E.g., daily, several times a week, occasionally.

fields.label: Current Alcohol Use
fields.branch: If Yes, collect alcohol_frequency. If No, skip.

fields.label: Alcohol Use Frequency
fields.ai_note: Only if alcohol_use = Yes.

fields.label: Surgeries / Hospitalizations List
fields.validate: Each entry needs: reason/procedure and approximate age. Hospital name optional.
fields.ai_note: Collect as a repeating list. For each: what procedure or reason, at what age, and hospital name (optional). Continue prompting 'Any others?' until patient says no more.

fields.label: Currently Taking Medications, Vitamins, or Supplements
Medications / Vitamins / Supplements List
fields.validate: Each entry must have a name AND dose/strength. If name provided without dose, ask: 'What is the dose or strength for that?' before moving on.
fields.ai_note: Collect as repeating list: medication name, strength/dose, and frequency. Validate each entry before proceeding.

fields.label: Allergy List
fields.validate: Each entry must have allergen name AND reaction type. If name provided without reaction, ask: 'What kind of reaction do you have to that?'
fields.ai_note: Collect as repeating list: allergen name and reaction type.

fields.label: Current or Most Recent Primary Care Provider

flag_if.flag: No PCP on file — may indicate uncoordinated care. Note in clinical output.

fields.ai_note: Ask for name and phone number. Optional but important for care coordination.

fields.label: Preferred Pharmacy

flag_if.flag: No pharmacy on file — provider will need to capture before prescribing.

fields.ai_note: Ask for name and phone number. Optional but needed for e-prescribing.

sections.name: Section 3: HIPAA Consent
sections.intro: HIPAA consent is never shown as a wall of text. The AI delivers a plain-language summary, explains rights, and collects explicit acknowledgment.

fields.label: HIPAA Plain Language Summary
fields.ai_note: Deliver verbatim: 'This clinic may share your health information with insurance companies, labs, and pharmacies to deliver your care. You have the right to request limits on how your information is used, and you can revoke this consent at any time in writing. Your treatment will not be affected either way.' Patient must actively acknowledge — not just scroll past. Do not reproduce the full HIPAA boilerplate.

fields.label: HIPAA Consent — PHI Use and Sharing

flag_if.flag: Patient declined PHI consent — needs in-person discussion before treatment. Do not block intake completion.

fields.ai_note: Required for treatment, but if patient says No, do not block intake. Explain consequences and flag for staff: 'Our team will speak with you about this before your visit.'

fields.label: Authorized PHI Contact 1 — Name
fields.validate: Both name and relationship required for each contact.

fields.label: Name and Address Confirmation
options: I need to make a correction
fields.ai_note: Pre-populate with name and address collected in Section 1. Ask patient to confirm accuracy before signature block.

sections.name: Section 4: General Consents
sections.intro: Most patients consent to everything. The AI delivers a plain-language summary and surfaces the two decisions that genuinely matter: Sliding Fee and GHHC data sharing.

fields.label: General Consents Plain Language Summary
fields.ai_note: Deliver: 'The following covers standard consents for: (1) treatment and testing including communicable diseases; (2) being seen by Physician Assistants or Nurse Practitioners; (3) financial responsibility — if you qualify for the Sliding Fee program, it is the last-resort payer; (4) e-prescribing; (5) appointment reminder communications. We will cover the two items that require your decision next.' Never read full legal text.

fields.label: Sliding Fee Disclosure Acknowledgment

flag_if.flag: Patient has no insurance — surface Sliding Fee disclosure with extra emphasis. Eligibility verification needed by clinic.
Patient has questions about Sliding Fee — note in output for staff follow-up.

fields.ai_note: Explain: 'If you qualify for the Sliding Fee Discount Program, it is the payer of last resort, and you are required to report any changes in insurance coverage.' If patient has no insurance, emphasize this especially.

fields.label: Greater Houston Healthconnect (GHHC) Data Sharing Authorization

flag_if.flag: Patient opted out of GHHC data sharing — note in output for clinic records team. No impact on treatment.

fields.ai_note: Explain: 'CGHC participates in Greater Houston Healthconnect, which shares your health records electronically with labs, pharmacies, hospitals, and insurers in the network. You can revoke this authorization within 3 days written notice. This does not affect your treatment or eligibility.' This is a genuine opt-in — ensure patient understands before answering.

fields.label: Photography Consent for Identity Verification
fields.ai_note: Explain: 'CGHC may take a photograph for identity verification or medical care. Only CGHC-approved devices are used — never personal cell phones.'

fields.label: Telehealth Limitations Acknowledgment
fields.ai_note: Only ask if visit type is telehealth. Skip entirely for in-person visits.

fields.label: Final Signature — All Consents Acknowledged
fields.validate: Signature required. Date auto-filled. If signing as personal representative, capture representative name and relationship.
fields.ai_note: Capture digital signature for entire consent package. If a guardian or representative is signing, collect their name and relationship to patient. Output includes signature confirmation and timestamp.

fields.label: Personal Representative Name (if signing on behalf)
fields.ai_note: Only if filling_for_self = 'Someone else'. Capture name and relationship of guardian or personal representative signing.
